{{Quote|Ralltiir, Chandrila, Esseles, and other key Core Worlds soon fell to the Imperials, and the leaders of the beleaguered New Republic returned to guerrilla fighting to battle their old enemy.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]], in [[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|''The New Essential Chronology'']]|<ref name="TNEC" />}}
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] was '''invaded''' by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. As part of the Imperial [[Pre–Shadow Hand campaign|offensive]] prior to [[Operation Shadow Hand]], the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] sent out vast forces to conquer strategic worlds in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]]. Along with [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] and [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]], Ralltiir was occupied by the Imperials.<ref name="TNEC" />
